texto: I learned a lot that night—like how incredibly mind blowing ho-hos and wine coolers were together, how that you could discover the answers to life’s most difficult questions by watching Buffy, but most of all, that no matter what was going on in life—a best friend could make it all seem bearable.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Peggy Martinez: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “I learned a lot that night—like how incredibly mind blowing ho-hos and wine coolers were together…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, amizade, could pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
